scripts.check: biome check package.json pi-package/package.json tsconfig.json pi-package test
scripts.verify: bun test && tsc --noEmit && biome check package.json pi-package/package.json tsconfig.json pi-package test
scripts.verify:ci: bun test ./test/extensions ./test/shared && tsc --noEmit && biome check package.json pi-package/package.json tsconfig.json pi-package test
scripts.release:check: bun run release:sync-readme && bun run verify && cd pi-package && npm pack --dry-run
scripts.release:prepare:patch: cd pi-package && npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && cd .. && bun run release:check
scripts.release:prepare:minor: cd pi-package && npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && cd .. && bun run release:check
scripts.release:prepare:major: cd pi-package && npm version major --no-git-tag-version && cd .. && bun run release:check
